MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROB HANCOCK OF THE PACIFIC JUSTICE, TEL. NO. 310-1940 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. DIANE L. WEBB OF MORGAN LEWIS & BOCKIUS, LLP, TEL. NO. 442-1353 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT GAMESTOP.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ERIKA MCCARTNEY, ON BEHALF OF HERSELF, A CLASS OF ALL OTHERS SIMILARLY SITUATED, AND THE GENERAL PUBLIC'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Settlement IS Denied. The court will not approve a Civil Code 1542 waiver. For the sixty day period cited in e.g. Agreement 2.5 signs to the same effect should be posted for public review at cashiers' counters. ALL FURTHER MOTIONS IN THIS CASE WILL BE HEARD IN DEPARTMENT 608 ON A FRIDAY BY CALLING THE CLERK IN DEPT. 608. Court will prepare form of order. Judge: Curtis Karnow, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077 =(302/CK)
